title: huperzia reflexa
intro: Huperzia reflexa, also known as the Australian ladder fern or eastern ladder fern, is a species of club moss in the family Huperziaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Huperzia reflexa include its ability to support cognitive function and neuroprotection, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of cancer cells. Huperzia reflexa can be prepared as a dietary supplement or herbal extract, which can be taken in capsule or powder form to support overall health and well-being.
